name: limubert
paper_title: LIMU-BERT: Unleashing the Potential of Unlabeled Data for IMU Sensing Applications
authors: Huatao Xu, Pengfei Zhou, Rui Tan, Mo Li, Guobin Shen
venue: Proceedings of the 19th ACM Conference on Embedded Networked Sensor Systems (SenSys) 2021
notes: Self-supervised 'ConSE tier' baseline with NO released weights: a ~62K-param masked-reconstruction Transformer (BERT-style) pretrained from scratch. We SELF-PRETRAIN its backbone on our 9-dataset training corpus (baselines/limubert/train.py, reusing the upstream SSL pipeline via sys.path) and fit a subject-disjoint softmax head over our 59-way global vocabulary for the zero-shot ConSE bridge. Input contract (verified BASELINES.md): 6-ch acc+gyro, 20 Hz, 120 samples (6 s), accel ÷ 9.8 -> g (gravity RETAINED), gyro raw, internal LayerNorm. base_v1 architecture: 4-layer (weight-shared), 72-d Transformer encoder.
